name: Binary Tree Zigzag Level Order Traversal

fullResponse.name: Binary Tree Zigzag Level Order Traversal
fullResponse.description:
Given the root of a binary tree, return the zigzag level order traversal of its nodes' values. (i.e., from left to right, then right to left for the next level and alternate between).

  • The first level is traversed Left-to-Right.
  • The second level is traversed Right-to-Left.
  • The third level is traversed Left-to-Right, and so on.
